title: Cobblemon EXP Bar
description: A simple mod that adds an experience bar similar to the ones used in Pokémon games. It also includes Combat Log improvements related to experience and leveling.
body:
# Cobblemon XP Bar A simple tailored addon for **Cobblemon** that adds a dynamic experience bar to the battle UI. ![WorkingCobblemonExpBar](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/e5944955ddc0fcee88bc421e08ef1baa4cc220e5.gif)
![Divider](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/1522e2aa8d516bd6fa766448c7613c27a4e5903c.png) ## Features - **Animated Experience Bar**: Watch your Pokémon's EXP grow smoothly after every battle action. - **Level Up Notifications**: Visual flash and sound effect when your Pokémon levels up. - **Seamless Integration**: Designed to fit perfectly with the default Cobblemon battle interface. - **Customizable**: The XP bar textures can be replaced via Resource Packs. ![SnorlaxFightWithExpBar](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/0864241c426f5e01e399d119b028f4071b208f37.png) ![Divider](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/1522e2aa8d516bd6fa766448c7613c27a4e5903c.png) ## Installation 1. Make sure you have **NeoForge** (1.21.1) installed. 2. Install [Cobblemon](https://modrinth.com/mod/cobblemon) (v1.6+). 3. Drop `cobblemon-xp-bar-1.0.1.jar` into your `mods` folder. ![Divider](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/1522e2aa8d516bd6fa766448c7613c27a4e5903c.png) ## Customization You can customize the look of the bar by creating a Resource Pack and replacing: - `assets/cobblemonxpbar/textures/gui/xp_bar.png` (Background) - `assets/cobblemonxpbar/textures/gui/xp_bar_fill.png` (Fill) ## License This project is licensed under the [MIT License](LICENSE).
